title: Ostryocarpus zenkerianus
taxonomy: Ostryocarpus zenkerianus is classified as a species of plant in the family Connaraceae. It belongs to the genus Ostryocarpus and is native to tropical Africa. This plant is a type of vine or climbing shrub. The Connaraceae family, to which Ostryocarpus zenkerianus belongs, consists of about 170 species of flowering plants. The classification of Ostryocarpus zenkerianus is still a subject of ongoing research and study in the field of botany.
